silhouette: Clean cute teardrop silhouette with a centered point, rounded base, and two small rounded feet at the bottom. Exact match to the Muci model sheet.
face: Large dot eyes, open friendly smile, glossy highlight marks near the upper-left side.
body_language: Approachable, beginner-friendly, soft and balanced. No arms, hands, fingers, paws, gloves, sleeves, wrists, elbows, shoes, or humanoid upper limbs.
object_interaction: Muci moves nearby objects through gentle telekinesis shown with floating props, motion lines, or subtle manga emphasis marks.
do_not_change: Keep the rounded base, two small rounded feet, and dot-eye spacing.
Do not harden the default expression.
Do not add hands, arms, fingers, paws, gloves, sleeves, wrists, elbows, shoes, or a humanoid body.
Do not remove, flatten, crop away, or redesign Muci's two small rounded feet in full-body views.
Do not redesign Muci away from the model-sheet teardrop.
